name: The Gods' Raspberry Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Red raspberries, canned or frozen and thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. For the crust: Cut Crisco into the flour and salt until it resembles cornmeal. Quickly stir in water, roll out dough, place in a 9-inch pie pan, and prick with a fork.
3. Bake for 8 minutes or until light brown.
4. For the filling: Dissolve cornstarch in 1/4 cup water. Mix together 2 cups raspberries, the remaining water or berry juice, sugar, and lemon juice. Bring mixture to a boil.
5. Mix 1/4 of the hot berries with the cornstarch and water, stir, and return thickened berries to the hot berry mix. Cook for 1 minute, then chill.
6. At serving time, add 2 cups remaining whole, uncooked berries into the baked crust. Pour chilled filling over berries and top with whipped cream.
Note: If using canned or frozen berries for the cooked mix, use berry juice (up to 1/2 cup) instead of the 1/2 cup water.
